message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class TicTacToe {
    - turn : Turn
    - board : Board
    - players : Player[] [0..*]
    
    + TicTacToe()
    + Play()
}

class Board {
    # Color : char[,] [0..*] = {'x', 'o'}
    - tokens : char[,] [0..*]
    
    + Board()
    
    + IsTicTacToe() : bool
    - IsTicTacTo(token : char) : bool
    + IsComplete() : bool
    - IsTileEmpty(row : int, column: int) : bool
    - IsTileFull(row : int, column: int) : bool
    
    + ToString() : string
}

class IO <<static>> {
    + ReadString(title : string) : string
    + ReadInt(title : string) : int
    
    + Write(title : string)
    + WriteLine()
    + WriteError(format : string)
}

class Player {
    ^ color : char
    
    + Player(i: int)
    + Put(board : Board)
    + Move(board : Board)
    + Win()
}

class Turn {
    ^ value : int = 0
    
    + Turn()
    + Current() «"Take"» 
    + Next() «"Not Take"» 
    + Change()
}


' Relationships from main controller to components
TicTacToe --> "1" Board
TicTacToe --> "*" Player  
TicTacToe --> "1" Turn 

Board ..> IO : uses via static methods
Player .down.> IO : calls for input/output operations  

@enduml
